recent_deployment.evidence_summary: A payments-api deployment completed 12 minutes before the alert and changed request timeout handling.
observations: payments-api deploy 2026-04-01-1 completed 12 minutes before alert fire time
Deployment diff reduced the downstream request timeout threshold
recent_deployment.recommended_next_read_only_action: Review the deployment diff for payments-api.

Runbook section 2 recommends validating downstream timeout metrics

primary_service_evidence.evidence_summary: Primary service evidence shows repeated timeout errors clustered around checkout requests.

timeout errors increased sharply after the most recent deploy window
